name: PCFS — Sharon Daily + Weekly Handwritten Notes
_backup_note: Updated 2026-05-21 by Cowork. Trigger changed from weekly (Mon 8am) to DAILY 8am PT. Build Email code is now day-aware: Monday = full week roster, Tue–Sun = that day's notes only. To = sharonpwatts@gmail.com, CC = graehamwattsclientcare@gmail.com + graehamwatts@gmail.com. n8n workflow id: 7CxqNkCQAuw1noGL.
build_email_logic: const isMonday = (tzNow.getDay() === 1). If Monday: notes where Week of (Mon) === thisMondayStr (full week). Else: notes where Date === today (__sameToday). Header, intro, empty-state, and subject all switch between 'This Week'/'Today' based on isMonday.
